news.headline: Survey by Protiviti and North Carolina State Univ finds economy, cyber threats, talent as top risks for boards. Resilience tested. 100 characters.
news.summary: Business leaders in organizations across the globe are feeling confident in their resilience, with the ability to navigate a rapidly changing risk landscape being put to the test. According to recent data from MENLO PARK, Calif., on Feb. 13, 2025, the economy stands out as the top concern for global business leaders, keeping them awake at night. This sentiment reflects the significance of economic stability, with key decision-makers emphasizing its pivotal role in shaping strategic decisions and future growth.

news.headline: Wolf Richter appointed CEO of SRLabs, succeeding founder Karsten Nohl. Allurity group pleased. Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Allurity, a European cybersecurity group, revealed Wolf Richter as the newly appointed CEO of Security Research Labs (SRLabs). Wolf, who also serves as the Chief Commercial Officer at Allurity, will take on the leadership of SRLabs. This change comes as part of the company's strategic decisions for enhancing its operations.

news.headline: Russia’s Foreign Minister Lavrov: I'm surprised that the world considers a Putin-Trump call as something extraordinary.
Motorsport market set to grow by USD 10.79B from 2025-2029, spurred by AI-powered report, major sponsorship investments.
news.summary: In New York on February 13, 2025, a report highlights the significant impact of AI on transforming the market, particularly focusing on the motorsport industry. Projections show a substantial growth of USD 10.79 billion expected in this market from 2025 to 2029. The forecast indicates that this growth will be continuous, at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of nearly 4.3% during this period.

news.headline: Banks borrow £54.7bln in BoE short-term repo operation
enreap receives 2025 Great Place To Work Certification™ for the third year, based on employee reviews.
news.summary: In Pune, India, as of February 13, 2025, enreap has achieved certification from Great Place To Work® for the third consecutive year. This esteemed recognition stems from feedback provided by the company's employees, highlighting their positive work experience at enreap. Great Place To Work® serves as the leading global entity in this realm, emphasizing employee satisfaction and organizational culture.

news.headline: SAP partners with Databricks to launch SAP Business Data Cloud, revolutionizing enterprise data management. #AI #BigData
news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, SAP SE (NYSE: SAP) has introduced SAP Business Data Cloud, a revolutionary solution aimed at consolidating all SAP and third-party data. This landmark collaboration is set to redefine enterprise data management, opening up new possibilities for Agentic AI. The announcement was made in New York on Feb. 13, 2025. The new solution promises to unleash the full potential of AI by bringing together a vast array of data sources.

news.headline: Mega Matrix Inc. premiered "A flash Marriage With The Billionaire Tycoon" on FlexTV, top series streaming platform.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, Singapore - Mega Matrix Inc. introduced a new romantic miniseries titled "A Flash Marriage With The Billionaire Tycoon" on their popular short series streaming platform, FlexTV. The show delves into themes of love, responsibility, and redemption, captivating viewers since its release on January 17. Mega Matrix Inc. is listed on NYSE American under the symbol MPU.

news.headline: Data company Databricks launches SAP Databricks, integrated into SAP Business Data Cloud, in strategic partnership.
news.summary: Databricks recently revealed a new offering, SAP Databricks, which is seamlessly integrated into the SAP Business Data Cloud. The product launch signifies a significant partnership between Databricks and SAP, aiming to enhance data and AI capabilities. This collaboration was made public on Feb. 13, 2025, in San Francisco. The joint venture between the two companies is set to bring innovative solutions to market, promising to revolutionize data processing.

news.headline: NICE to announce Q4 2024 results on Feb 20, 2025, before opening of NASDAQ. Conference call at 8:30 AM ET, 1:30 PM UK, and 3:30 PM Israel. Webcast available at https://www.nice.com/company/investors/upcoming-event.
news.summary: NICE, listed as NICE on Nasdaq, is set to release its Q4 2024 results on February 20, 2025, before NASDAQ opens. A conference call will follow on the same day. The call is scheduled for: 8:30 AM Eastern Time, 1:30 PM UK Time, and 3:30 PM Israel Time. To join the webcast, visit the Company's website at https://www.nice.com/company/investors/upcoming-event. Participants can register for the webcast or dial-in using the provided link.

news.headline: Ooredoo and Iron Mountain team up to grow data centers in MENA; agreement includes Iron Mountain's stake in Ooredoo's MENA Digital Hub.
news.summary: In a significant development, Ooredoo Group and Iron Mountain have unveiled a strategic partnership. This collaboration involves Iron Mountain, a prominent information management service provider, acquiring a minority equity share in Ooredoo's carrier-neutral data center company, MENA Digital Hub. The partnership aims to bolster Ooredoo's presence in the MENA region by enhancing its offering of hyperscale and AI data center infrastructure. By leveraging the expertise of Iron Mountain alongside Ooredoo's established local development and operational capabilities, the partnership seeks to advance the reach and quality of data center services in the region.

Himax Technologies reports better than expected Q4 2024 results, with Q1 2025 revenues expected to decrease by 8.5% to 12.5%. Gross margin estimated at 30.5%, with profit per diluted ADS between 9.0 and 11.0 cents.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, Company successfully exceeded the revenue, gross margin, and earnings per share (EPS) projected in the guidance range provided on November 7, 2024. Looking ahead to the first quarter of 2025, the company anticipates a decrease in revenues by 8.5% to 12.5% compared to the previous quarter. The expected gross margin for the upcoming quarter is around 30.5%. Furthermore, the profit per diluted American Depositary Share (ADS) is forecasted to range from 9.0 cents to 11.0 cents.

news.headline: UK Business Minister Reynolds on tariffs: There are concerns about global steel over capacity, but the UK is not a problem within that and there is a basis for discussion.
UK Business Minister Reynolds on tariffs: On steel and aluminium, we can engage with the US.
Stay alert for misinformation in upcoming events. Important risk ahead.
UK Business Minister Reynolds on tariffs: We will be looking to engage with the US.
Ethereum (ETH) surged by 3% on Feb.13 due to CBOE BZX exchange's plans to add staking to 21Shares's Ether ETF.
news.summary: On February 13th, the price of Ethereum has surged by 3% following news that the CBOE BZX exchange has submitted an application to introduce staking to 21Shares's Ether ETF. This development has spurred positive movement in the market, with Ethereum's value experiencing a notable increase.

news.headline: Forschungszentrum Jülich buys D-Wave™ Quantum Computer, making it the first HPC center with a D-Wave Advantage™ System.
news.summary: D-Wave Quantum Inc., a key player in quantum computing solutions, and the Jülich Supercomputing Centre (JSC) at Forschungszentrum Jülich (FZJ) have revealed that FZJ has acquired a D-Wave quantum computer. This marks FZJ as the initial high-performance computing (HPC) center globally to possess a D-Wave Advantage annealing quantum computer. D-Wave is recognized as the pioneer in the provision of commercial quantum computers, and it operates under the ticker symbol QBTS on the NYSE.

news.headline: D-Wave offers on-premises quantum computing systems to advance quantum + AI research. Customers can purchase D-Wave™ Advantage™ systems for experimentation.
news.summary: D-Wave Quantum Inc., a renowned quantum computing company, headquartered in Palo Alto, California, and listed on the NYSE under the symbol QBTS, has released a statement. The company is known for its cutting-edge quantum computing systems, software, and services and holds the distinction of being the first commercial provider of quantum computers globally. In recent news, D-Wave has declared its commitment to assisting research centers, academic institutions, and governments by offering the opportunity to procure on-premises D-Wave™ Advantage™ quantum computing systems. These advanced systems are intended to facilitate customers in exploring the possibilities of quantum-driven research, development, and applications. This move is anticipated to significantly advance the realm of quantum computing, empowering organizations to delve deeper into this transformative technology.

news.headline: NFL coaching salaries have surged exponentially since the 1990s, making it a lucrative career for first-timers with Super Bowl plans.
news.summary: Compensation for coaches, including those in their first coaching roles, has significantly increased since the 1990s. This rise in pay is driven by teams' efforts to secure individuals capable of transforming their franchises into consistent Super Bowl contenders.

news.headline: Paris rental robbed, Airbnb denies compensation. Thief entered with key under doormat. French police verified. Airbnb supports host.
news.summary: The theft of a family's possessions occurred after a thief utilized a spare key hidden beneath the doormat of their Airbnb rental. The French authorities validated the incident, although the insurance adjuster representing Airbnb favored the stance of the host.

news.headline: Trump is drastically reducing regulations at the SEC, CFPB, and EEOC, angering consumer groups. Business groups support this shift.
news.summary: Consumer advocates argue that the rapid pace of deregulation is dismantling agencies designed to safeguard everyday Americans. Nevertheless, business groups have consistently supported efforts to reduce regulations.

news.headline: French Public Audit Office: France will need to reduce annual spending by €110 bln to achieve a deficit target of 3% of GDP in 2029.
French Public Audit Office: Debt service payments are set to snowball to 3.2% of GDP by 2029.
Hamas confirms its commitment to continue implementing the ceasefire deal according to the agreed timeframe - Statement.
French Public Audit Office: France can no longer put off reining in its public finances.

Mitch McConnell criticizes Trump's tariff plans, warns of price hikes for American industry and workers due to potential trade war.
news.summary: Senator Mitch McConnell, a Republican from Kentucky, has raised worries regarding President Donald Trump's tariff policies, fearing they could lead to a trade war and result in higher prices for consumers and businesses in the United States. The concerns were highlighted in an op-ed published in Louisville’s Courier-Journal and reported by CNBC. McConnell pointed out that Trump's aggressive tariff proposals could have lasting negative impacts on American industry and workers.President Trump, known for his advocacy of tariffs, recently imposed broad import duties on Canada, Mexico, and China, as well as additional tariffs on steel and aluminum imports. While the tariffs on Mexico and Canada were delayed for a month, this postponement is set to end in the first week of March.In his op-ed, McConnell recognized the need for significant action from America's neighboring countries to address the border crisis. Nevertheless, he emphasized that tariffs are a cause for concern. For the complete story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: David M. Foulkes becomes Chairman of Brunswick Corporation Board in addition to CEO role, effective March 1. (GLOBE NEWSWIRE)
news.summary: In Mettawa, Illinois on February 13, 2025, the Brunswick Corporation (NYSE: BC) announced that CEO David M. Foulkes has been elected as the new chairman of the board. This change in leadership will take effect on March 1, consolidating Foulkes' role within the company.

Canadian skincare brand Indeed Labs reveals new skincare products for Gen Alpha, including a two-in-one cleanser and milky toner.
news.summary: In Toronto on February 13, 2025, Indeed Labs, a prestigious Canadian skincare brand known for its scientifically supported beauty products, launched a fresh collection catering to the demands of a modern demographic. This new product range includes a versatile two-in-one cleanser and a hydrating milky toner.

news.headline: Ferrero Group's turnover rises by 8.9% to EUR18.4 billion in 2023/2024, with focus on innovation and new product launches.
news.summary: Concluding another successful year, the Ferrero Group reports a significant 8.9% rise in turnover, reaching an impressive EUR18.4 billion. The company's commitment to innovation is evident through the introduction of new products and expansion into different categories. A notable highlight includes the introduction of Nutella Ice Cream as part of the celebration marking the brand's 60th anniversary. Accompanying this growth, the total capital investment for the...

news.headline: Sony raises forecast due to expected improvements in gaming and music, with profits now expected to reach $8 billion.
Scatec sells 39MW wind power plant in Vietnam to SUSI Asia Energy Transition Fund. Deal closed in Feb 2025.
news.summary: In Oslo on 13 February 2025, it was announced that Scatec ASA has completed the sale of its entire ownership in the Dam Nai wind farm, a 39-megawatt (MW) project in Vietnam. The buyer, Sustainable Asia Renewable Assets, is a part of the SUSI Asia Energy Transition Fund which focuses on large-scale renewable energy investments. This transaction comes after a previous stock exchange notice from 13 September 2024 where the sale was initially disclosed.

news.headline: Egyptian sources: Prisoner exchange will take place on Saturday as planned - al Arabiya.
NVIDIA strengthens critical infrastructure security with AI, collaborating with top OT providers to combat rising cyber threats.
news.summary: NVIDIA has collaborated with top OT providers to enhance security for critical infrastructure by utilizing AI technology. The partnership aims to combat the increasing cybersecurity risks in intricate environments. This move comes as a response to the rising challenges faced by these providers, with the integration of AI to strengthen their security measures.

news.headline: Trump's call with Putin marks a notable policy reversal for the US. #news #TrumpPutinMeeting #policychange
Bloomberg reports on the performance of the consumer discretionary sector and industry.
SEC's crypto task force head Hester Peirce comments that meme coins may not fall under SEC's jurisdiction.
news.summary: Hester Peirce, who leads the SEC’s cryptocurrency task force, expressed during an interview that a large number of meme coins in the cryptocurrency market may fall outside the SEC's regulatory reach. The scrutiny came following meme coin launches by former President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump. Peirce highlighted that these meme coins likely do not fall under the SEC's current regulatory framework. The commissioner indicated that the agency needs to assess each case individually. The news was reported on Benzinga.com.
